get.description: Retrieve all DNS records for a specified domain zone. Returns an array of DNS records including A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, and other record types.

post.description: Create a new DNS record for a domain. Requires domain ownership. The record will be validated against DNS zone rules before creation.

put.description: Update an existing DNS record by its ID. Requires domain ownership. The updated record will be validated against DNS zone rules.

delete.description: Delete a DNS record by its ID. Requires domain ownership. The deletion will be validated to ensure zone integrity.

put.description: Update multiple DNS records in a single transaction. Requires domain ownership. All records must belong to the same zone and will be validated together.

post.description: Create multiple DNS records in a single transaction. Requires domain ownership. All records will be validated together against DNS zone rules.

delete.description: Delete multiple DNS records by their IDs in a single transaction. Requires domain ownership. The zone will be validated after deletion.

post.description: Park a domain by setting up default parking DNS records (A and AAAA records pointing to the parking server). Optionally override existing conflicting records.

put.description: Park a domain by setting up default parking DNS records (A and AAAA records pointing to the parking server). Optionally override existing conflicting records.

get.description: Check whether a domain has the standard parking DNS records configured. Returns true if the domain is parked, false otherwise.
Retrieve all domains owned by the current user. Returns domain details including DNS status, nameservers, and expiration dates.

post.description: Request NFSC test tokens on Sepolia. Rate limited by user and wallet address.

get.description: Retrieve all order items for the current user. Returns order items sorted by creation date in descending order.
Retrieve detailed information about an order including items, payments, and user details. User must own the order.
Retrieve all order items for the current user, sorted by creation date in descending order.

post.description: Purchase a single domain instantly for trial. Validates domain availability and creates the order, the domain is only registered for a couple of days before it expires or renewed if you please
Purchase a single domain instantly without adding to cart. Validates domain availability, creates payments and order, then starts the order processing workflow.

nftReceivinggWallet.description: Wallet address and chain ID of the wallet that will receive the NFT, defaults to the buyer's wallet and "Base Chain"
Wallet address and chain ID of the wallet that will receive the NFT, defaults to the buyer's wallet and "Base Chain"

post.description: Purchase a single domain instantly and apply DNS records after processing.

nftReceivinggWallet.description: Wallet address and chain ID of the wallet that will receive the NFT, defaults to the buyer's wallet and "Base Chain"

get.description: Retrieve payment method details for an order, including card info for Stripe payments and wallet addresses for on-chain payments.
Purchase a single domain instantly without adding to cart. Validates domain availability, creates payments and order, then starts the order processing workflow.
Retrieve a list of domains or parent domains(ie; their subdomains are available for trial)

Retrieve NFSC (Namefi Stable Coin) balance across all supported blockchain chains for the authenticated user's linked wallet addresses. Returns both raw contract values and human-readable USD amounts.
Check if a domain is available for registration. Returns availability status, pricing details, current owner (if any), and registration constraints.

schema.description: The domain to check availability for

get.description: Generate domain suggestions based on a search query. Supports pagination and optional parent domain filtering for third-level domain suggestions.

schema.description: Optional parent domain for third-level domain suggestions

get.description: Generate and store a replay-protected nonce for a wallet address before signing a SIWE message.

schema.description: Wallet address that will sign the SIWE message.

nonce.description: Generated nonce to embed in the SIWE message.

error.description: Reason the nonce could not be issued.

schema.description: Result of requesting a nonce for a SIWE sign-in flow.

get.description: Verify that a previously issued nonce still exists and return the canonical SIWE message payload to sign.

schema.description: Wallet address that will sign the SIWE message.
Nonce previously issued by the server for this signer.
Optional EIP-155 chain ID to bind the SIWE session to.

address.description: Wallet address that signed the SIWE message.

chainId.description: EIP-155 chain ID the SIWE session is bound to.

expirationTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for a SIWE temporal field.

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for a SIWE temporal field.

nonce.description: Nonce previously issued by the server for this signer.

notBefore.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for a SIWE temporal field.

requestId.description: Optional identifier used to correlate the SIWE request.

resources.description: Optional resources referenced by the SIWE message.

scheme.description: Optional URI scheme for the relying party.

uri.description: URI that is the subject of the SIWE sign-in.

message.description: Wire-format SIWE message payload with ISO timestamps.

messageString.description: Canonical EIP-4361 message string to sign.

schema.description: Result of preparing a canonical SIWE message after verifying the nonce exists.

post.description: Verify a signed SIWE message, consume its nonce, and return a session token plus stored session details.

signature.description: Hex-encoded signature produced for the SIWE message.

address.description: Wallet address that signed the SIWE message.

chainId.description: EIP-155 chain ID the SIWE session is bound to.

expirationTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for a SIWE temporal field.

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for a SIWE temporal field.

nonce.description: Nonce previously issued by the server for this signer.

notBefore.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for a SIWE temporal field.

requestId.description: Optional identifier used to correlate the SIWE request.

resources.description: Optional resources referenced by the SIWE message.

scheme.description: Optional URI scheme for the relying party.

uri.description: URI that is the subject of the SIWE sign-in.

message.description: EIP-4361 Sign-In with Ethereum message payload.

address.description: Expected signer wallet address used to cross-check the SIWE message.

schema.description: Input required to verify a signed SIWE message and create a session.

valid.description: Indicates the SIWE signature was verified.

recoveredAddress.description: Recovered signer address after successful verification.

token.description: Opaque SIWE session token to send on authenticated requests.

address.description: Wallet address bound to the created SIWE session.

chainId.description: EIP-155 chain ID bound to the created SIWE session.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp describing when the SIWE session was created.

session.description: Stored SIWE session details returned with the session token.

valid.description: Indicates the SIWE signature verification failed.

error.description: Reason the SIWE signature could not be verified.

schema.description: Result of verifying a SIWE message and creating a session token.

get.description: Retrieve the list of blockchain networks that are allowed for SIWE authentication.
